question.label: Backend workload
question.name: When you say 'doing all the tickets for the backend stuff is very hard', what's making it hard — volume, complexity, or something else?
question.description: Drills deeper into the specifics of what makes the backend workload challenging.

answer: just so many ares, global app, oe x 3 , managing the team and all the POs coming directly to me.

assessment.note: Describes overwhelming workload with multiple areas and direct PO interactions — negative wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Self-read opener
new_queue.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?

new_queue.label: Week reflection
new_queue.name: How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side, especially in terms of cross-team interactions?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Specific feedback
new_queue.name: Could you share an instance where communication with the UX team was particularly challenging?
